pass1_value.note: Pumble uses API keys sent in the X-Api-Key header to authenticate REST API requests; API keys are created in the workspace API section.

final_value.note: Pumble's OpenAPI/Swagger definition declares a security scheme of type apiKey with name "X-Api-Key" in the request header (components.securitySchemes.ApiKeyAuth), and applies it globally via the top-level security requirement.
